title: galium anglicum subsp. tenuicaule
intro: Galium anglicum subsp. tenuicaule, also known as Lesser Bedstraw, is a subspecies of perennial plant in the Rubiaceae family, characterized by its small white or pinkish flowers and narrow leaves. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds, reduce swelling, and combat infections. The health benefits of Lesser Bedstraw include its ability to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to promote healing and internally to support overall health.
